message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Customer
participant "TripFinder" as TF
participant "Trip" as T
participant "Bicycle" as B

Customer -> TF: suitable_trips(\non_date,\ndifficulty,\nneed_bike)
activate TF

TF -> T: suitable_trips(\non_date,\non_difficulty)
activate T
T --> TF

note right of TF: for each trips
end note

TF -> B: suitable_bicycle(\ntrip_date,\nroute_type)
activate B
B --> TF

deactivate T
deactivate TF

TF --> Customer: result

@enduml
